data.title: Jennifer L. Mnookin appointed as next president of Columbia University starting on July 1, 2026.
data.description: On January 25, 2026, it was announced that Jennifer L. Mnookin, a distinguished legal scholar currently serving as Chancellor of the University of Wisconsin-Madison, has been chosen by Columbia University's Board of Trustees as the next president of the institution. Mnookin is set to assume the presidency on July 1.
Multiple ambulances are reportedly en route to Bangor International Airport in Maine with unconfirmed reports of a plane crash-World Source News

data.title: Investors of Aquestive Therapeutics facing significant losses urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for investigation. Contact James Wilson for options discussion.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses with Aquestive Therapeutics to reach out to him directly. If you have incurred notable losses in Aquestive Therapeutics stock or options, Wilson encourages you to contact him to explore potential avenues for recourse.
Silver surges to a new high at $107.99/oz, rising close to 5%.
CSI SH-SZ-HK Gold Industry Index in China poised to rise around 4% at open.
Jimblebar iron ore from BHP heads to Malaysia and Vietnam amid stalled sales to China.

data.title: Investigation launched by Faruqi & Faruqi into Wealthfront post-IPO stock decline. Investors urged to contact with significant losses.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced notable losses in Wealthfront to reach out to him directly. If you have suffered significant losses in Wealthfront stock or options and wish to explore your options, Wilson encourages you to contact him for a discussion.
Benchmark butadiene rubber futures in Shanghai gain over 3.5%.

data.title: Investors of Beta Bionics with significant losses urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson directly.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced substantial losses in Beta Bionics to reach out to him directly. If you have been impacted by losses in Beta Bionics stock or options and wish to explore your legal options, Wilson encourages you to contact him.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of Rezolute. Contact James Wilson if you suffered significant losses.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Rezolute to reach out to him directly. If you have suffered significant losses in Rezolute stock or options and wish to explore your legal options, Wilson is available for discussion.
